description: Mike Freida discusses the establishment of Empire DAO in a six-story building in Soho, Manhattan, dedicated to Web3. The space includes hacker houses, a lounge, and a performance center for tech demonstrations. He shares experiences from the Solana community and the importance of building connections in the Web3 space.
topic_summary: Mike Freida introduces Empire DAO, a Web3 hub in NYC, highlighting its facilities and community-building efforts. He recounts his journey in the Solana ecosystem and the significance of collaboration among builders [t=1:00].
